evals.prompt: Schedule this video I just made (output/video.mp4) to Instagram Reels and TikTok for tomorrow morning. Write the captions for me.
evals.expected_output: Platform-adapted captions (polished for IG, casual for TikTok), hashtags tailored per platform, confirmation prompt with scheduled time, Buffer API calls to schedule both posts

assertions.name: asks-confirmation
assertions.description: Shows summary and asks for confirmation before scheduling

assertions.name: different-captions
assertions.description: Writes different captions for Instagram vs TikTok

assertions.name: platform-hashtags
assertions.description: Uses more hashtags for Instagram (5-15) than TikTok (3-5)

assertions.name: calls-profiles-api
assertions.description: Fetches connected profiles from Buffer API

assertions.name: sets-scheduled-at
assertions.description: Includes scheduled_at parameter with tomorrow morning time

evals.prompt: Plan my social media content for next week. I post about productivity and personal development. I'm active on Instagram, Twitter, and LinkedIn.
evals.expected_output: Weekly content calendar with platform-specific post ideas, suggested posting times, and content pillar rotation

evals.prompt: Post this to Twitter right now: 'Just shipped v2.0 of our app. 3 months of work, 47 bugs fixed, 12 new features. Thread below 👇'
evals.expected_output: Confirms the post text, uses Buffer API to post immediately with now=true, returns confirmation with post URL
